title: Khan (starship)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|a group of freighters|the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], [[Lo Khan]]}}
'''''Khan''''' was a group of three [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] that received the [[Poison/Legends|poisoned]] [[Grain/Legends|grain]] shipment by [[Ghorin]]'s [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] group ''[[Transmor]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
